title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Sualeh Asif interviews Simon Eskildsen about scaling infrastructure at Shopify, the emergence of new database companies, and the role of AI coding agents. Topics include engineering principles, infrastructure evolution in the 2010s, and what distinguishes top-tier engineers in the AI era.
